case_title: MELVIN ORDONEZ ET AL VS. KEVIN GLEN

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-02-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-13-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS MELVIN ORDONEZ ARE ROSIBEL MARCIA ARE PRESENT. ASSISTED BY MARGO SEELY, CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT KEVIN GLEN. JUDGE PRO TEM RICHARD GROTCH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ORDONEZ, MELVIN MARCIA, ROSIBEL AS TO DEFENDANT GLEN, KEVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
